ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., BMC, IRM) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock (e.g., BMC SOFTWARE, INC.) */,
  "last_price" REAL /* Last price of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-Earnings (PE) ratio */,
  "price_to_sales" REAL /* Price-to-Sales (P/S) ratio */,
  "price_to_book" REAL /* Price-to-Book (P/B) ratio */,
  "peg_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-Earnings Growth (PEG) ratio */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock data */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Last trading volume of the stock */,
  "52_week_high" REAL /* 52-week high price */,
  "52_week_low" REAL /* 52-week low price */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value indicating volatility */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchange ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's website URL */,
  "employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Company's headquarters location */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange (e.g., New York, California) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Time the exchange opens */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Time the exchange closes */,
  "website" TEXT /* Exchange's website URL */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date the stock price was recorded */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "volume_change" INTEGER /* Change in volume from the previous day */,
  "volume_percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in volume from the previous day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchange ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_stock_watchlist" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the stock to their watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock added to the watchlist */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  "notes" TEXT /* User's notes about the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stock_watchlist_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stock_watchlist_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
